rationale.root_cause: The response is empty and does not identify the memcpy at the FLAW site that uses sizeof(structCharVoid) and overflows charFirst/overwrites voidSecond.
rationale.local_fix: No fix is proposed; it does not suggest changing the memcpy length to sizeof(structCharVoid.charFirst).
rationale.global_fix: No global remediation is suggested, such as representing the destination as a bounded buffer/span to couple copy size to capacity.
